view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 failed
blocks.message: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for weather dependency with a cancellation policy is not validated as satisfied.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for weather dependency with a cancellation policy is not validated as satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of being weather-dependent with a cancellation policy. However, the evidence does not provide sufficient details on how the cancellation policy is implemented or how it responds to weather conditions. The linked use case mentions that guests can reschedule or get a refund in case of severe weather, but it does not confirm that this policy is operational or effectively communicated to customers, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
